// WHO I AM

Digital Architect

Designing the Future,
One Pixel at a Time

I'm Rohith Citystar — a UX/UI designer who sees every interface as a universe waiting to be explored. My work lives at the intersection of cinematic storytelling, futuristic aesthetics, and human-centered design. From holographic interfaces to immersive brand experiences, I build digital worlds that feel alive.

Drawing inspiration from sci-fi universes, luxury automotive culture, and cutting-edge technology, I create designs that don't just function — they captivate. Every project is a journey into the extraordinary.

50+ Projects
5+ Years
30+ Clients
